name: Apple Nut Cake - Part 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease the 9-inch springform pan with olive oil.
3. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda, cinnamon (if using), and salt.
4. In a large bowl, beat applesauce, brown sugar, and olive oil until well blended.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture to the applesauce mixture until smooth.
6. Spoon the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Arrange apple slices in overlapping circles on top of the batter.
8. Cover the pan with aluminum foil.
9. Bake for 55 minutes.
10. While the cake is baking, heat olive oil in a small skillet over medium heat.
11. Add nuts and cook until golden, stirring frequently.
12. Add granulated sugar and cinnamon; stir well to combine.
13. Sprinkle the nut topping evenly over the cake.
14. Continue baking, covered for 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
15. Remove the foil and let cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
16. Carefully remove the side of the pan and allow it to cool completely before serving.
17. Makes 10-12 servings
